ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the project */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the feature (if numerical) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the feature (if numerical) */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the feature (if numerical) */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the feature (if numerical) */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the feature (if numerical) */,
  "unique_values" INTEGER /* Count of unique values (if categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "feature_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first feature */,
  "feature_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second feature */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation metric (e.g., Pearson's r) */,
  "pval" REAL /* p-value of the correlation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the correlation belongs to */,
  "method" TEXT /* Correlation method used (e.g., Pearson, Spearman) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the correlation was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the correlation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the correlation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_feature_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id_2") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_feature_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id_1") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date the user last performed an activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Date the user last accessed the project */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "feature_name_1" TEXT /* Name of the first feature */,
  "feature_name_2" TEXT /* Name of the second feature */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation metric (e.g., Pearson's r) */,
  "pval" REAL /* p-value of the correlation */,
  "method" TEXT /* Correlation method used (e.g., Pearson, Spearman) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the feature correlation was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the feature correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correlation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the result was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the result was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_results_correlation_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_id") REFERENCES correlations ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_results_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the API key was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date the API key was last used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
